summary: V1.0.9 Omni-Agent Bug Fix Verification - PASS. The wand-flow bug fix is VERIFIED WORKING. The 5-second minimum dwell guard (RITUAL_STEP_MIN_DWELL_MS=5000) in ProcessorState.js correctly prevents ContextBus commits from auto-advancing the chain. AgentHUD now appears and stays visible for the full step duration. Backend 6/6 pytest pass. Skip and Abort buttons work correctly.

issues: Setting cosmic_prefs.immersionLevel='calm' via localStorage before page load does not result in AgentHUD showing data-immersion='calm'. The HUD shows 'full' instead. This may be a timing issue with SensoryContext initialization or the localStorage key format.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate why calm immersion setting via localStorage doesn't propagate to AgentHUD data-immersion attribute. The SensoryContext reads from cosmic_prefs but the value may not be applied correctly on initial load.
critical_code_review_comments: ProcessorState.js lines 600-622: The RITUAL_STEP_MIN_DWELL_MS=5000 fix is correctly implemented. The busSubscribe callback now checks (last.t - stepStartedAt) >= 5000 before triggering step-complete events.
AgentHUD.jsx: Correctly reads immersion from useSensory() and applies opacity based on immersion level.

success_rate.frontend: 95% - Wand flow fix verified, calm immersion minor issue

seed_data_creation: Multiple ritual chains created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The wand-flow bug fix is verified working. The 5-second minimum dwell guard prevents ContextBus commits from auto-advancing the chain. AgentHUD appears after forge and stays visible for the full step duration (tested 19.5+ seconds on step 1). Skip advances to next step, Abort removes HUD. Backend pytest 6/6 pass. Minor issue: calm immersion setting via localStorage may not propagate correctly to AgentHUD.

features_verified.wand_forge_to_agentHUD: PASS - AgentHUD appears after forge and stays visible
features_verified.5s_minimum_dwell_guard: PASS - Step 1 held for 19.5+ seconds without auto-advancing
features_verified.wand_pill_LIVE_badge: PASS - Shows '· LIVE' when chain is running
features_verified.calm_immersion_override: PARTIAL - HUD appears but data-immersion attribute shows 'full' instead of 'calm'

rca_of_the_issue: The original bug was caused by ContextBus subscription in ProcessorState.js firing ritual:step-complete events immediately after each step became active. The fix added RITUAL_STEP_MIN_DWELL_MS=5000 constant that enforces a 5-second minimum dwell before bus commits can trigger step advancement. This prevents engine-mount commits from racing the timestamp check and auto-completing the chain.
